title: PDF Receipt Generation for Crypto Stores Explained for Digital Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Payment confirmed, receipt generated, download link sent — all within 30 seconds. The fully automated digital product pipeline.

content.text: Digital creators in restricted countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya struggle to sell ebooks, courses, and software without PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad. They get blocked because of geographic restrictions, banking limitations, or KYC requirements. Unchained Commerce has a solution: automated digital product delivery with PDF receipts, made possible by NOWPayments and our Web3 Wallet Connect integration. Learn how to break free from payment processors and sell digital products globally without hassle.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

PDF receipt generation is a critical component of automated digital product delivery. It ensures buyers receive proof of purchase and can claim refunds if necessary. With our system, you can focus on creating and selling digital products, while our technology handles the fulfillment process, including generating PDF receipts for each transaction. This is especially important for creators who rely on a reliable and transparent payment experience to build trust with their customers.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Our Web3 Wallet Connect integration enables buyers to pay in multiple cryptocurrencies, including BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins. When a buyer completes a purchase, our system triggers a webhook that notifies the Core Shop Engine to deliver the digital product. The engine generates a PDF receipt, which is then sent to the buyer via email. This process is automated, ensuring fast and reliable delivery of digital products and receipts.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Manual fulfillment has specific failure modes that automation eliminates permanently. Time zone gaps mean buyers in Asia or Europe complete purchases while you are asleep, and wait hours for a download link. Notification fatigue means a payment webhook email gets buried in your inbox and an order sits unfulfilled for days. Human error means the wrong file gets sent, or the download link expires before it is sent. Volume spikes mean ten simultaneous orders overwhelm a manual process that works fine at one order per day. The Core Shop Engine handles all of these cases identically — every order gets the same automated treatment regardless of when it arrives, how many arrive simultaneously, or whether you are actively monitoring your inbox.
Automated digital product delivery with PDF receipts ensures fast and reliable delivery of digital products and receipts, building trust with your customers.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Our system consists of three main components: the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and the Admin Dashboard. The Core Shop Engine handles automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipt generation. Web3 Wallet Connect provides frontend wallet integration and multi-chain QR code generation, enabling buyers to pay in various cryptocurrencies. The Admin Dashboard offers transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics, making it easier to track and manage sales.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To get started, sign up for our Web3 Wallet Connect integration, which costs $19.99. Set up your digital product store using the Core Shop Engine, and configure the Admin Dashboard to track your sales. When a buyer completes a purchase, our system will automatically generate a PDF receipt and deliver the digital product. Don't wait – start selling your digital products globally today and experience the freedom of automated digital product delivery.
How does automated digital product delivery work?

Automated digital delivery works through a webhook — an HTTP notification that NOWPayments sends to your Core Shop Engine endpoint when a payment confirms on-chain. The engine receives the webhook, reads the payment amount and transaction hash from the payload, verifies the amount matches the order total, confirms the transaction hash on the blockchain directly, then generates a PDF receipt and sends a delivery email with a time-limited download link to the buyer's email address. The entire sequence runs server-side with no user interface and no manual steps. It completes in under 30 seconds from payment confirmation in almost all cases. If any step fails, the Admin Dashboard flags the order for manual review so nothing slips through.
Our Web3 Wallet Connect integration enables buyers to pay in multiple cryptocurrencies, opening up new markets for your digital products.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're selling digital products and want to break free from payment processors like PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad, our automated digital product delivery system with PDF receipts is the solution you need. You can also explore our Web3 Wallet Connect integration, which costs $19.99, to enable buyers to pay in multiple cryptocurrencies. Visit our shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more.
Your Action Checklist

To automate your digital product delivery and PDF receipt generation, follow these steps: Connect your digital product store to our Web3 Wallet Connect integration and configure the Admin Dashboard. Set up your digital product store using the Core Shop Engine and configure the Admin Dashboard to track your sales. Test your automated delivery system to ensure it's working correctly. Once you're ready, start selling your digital products globally and experience the freedom of automated digital product delivery.
By automating your digital product delivery, you can focus on creating and selling digital products, while our technology handles the fulfillment process.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
